notes: founded 2002 by Paolo Davanzo + Lisa Marr; 55-seat microcinema; lease expired end of January 2022; org continues as itinerant EPFC Collective and continues to host screenings in HML's basement
source: The Eastsider LA + EPFC Collective + Hyperallergic

notes: founded 2003 by Mark Allen; closed with farewell event Jan 13 2018; the storefront unit Machine Project occupied is the unit Heavy Manners Library now occupies (Unit D)
3-year gap between Machine Project's January 2018 closure and HML's 2021 opening; the unit's status during these years is not publicly documented

founded 2021; same building as prior Machine Project / EPFC tenancies; multi-room layout: street-level shop and reading area + upstairs gallery + basement performance / screening space hosting EPFC Collective screenings
